subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These two servants have sought refuge in the shelter of Thy mercy and have taken sanctuary at the threshold of Thy divinity and have turned their faces toward Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذان عبدان قد التجئا الی کهف رحمانیتک و لاذا الی عتبه ربانیتک و توجها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
